text.title: Sentry Alert Routing for Solos Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Sentry Alert Routing for Solos end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: declare-sources
step.action: Write sources list with type + endpoint.

step.name: draft-filter-rules
step.action: Per source, define filter rules (env, level, fingerprint, threshold).

step.name: set-single-channel
step.action: Pick one channel + endpoint; reject extras.

step.name: emit-config
step.action: Write solo-alerting.yaml; assign owner; set last_reviewed.
